bio:
I started this project in 2019 on a hunch that a career switch was worth trying. That hunch led me straight into the world of music supervision, and honestly? I never want to leave.

I'm a first generation Egyptian American, and culture has always been at the center of how I experience the world. I love talking about where I come from, and I love learning about everywhere else through the music that comes out of it. There is no faster way into a culture than through its sounds.

I love music. Not in a passive, background-noise kind of way, but in a *I need to tell everyone about this song right now* kind of way. Discovering something new that stops me mid-scroll, mid-conversation, mid-whatever... that's the feeling I'm always chasing and the one I love sharing most.

Sarahtonin Sounds is the home for all of it: the curation, the obsessing, the connecting the right music to the right moment. It started as a leap of faith and turned into the truest version of the work I was meant to do.

Come find your next favorite thing.
